## Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund Sells Intel Shares

Routine pension fund reduction with no thesis implication; noted as one of several INTC institutional flow disclosures this period with no clear directional consensus.

- Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund sold Intel Corporation (INTC) shares; the headline specifies 112,969 shares.
- Classified as a routine pension fund position reduction; no price or rationale provided.
- Classifier assigns low confidence and no fundamental signal.
